vocab.meaning: nằm ẩn mình/biệt lập ở một nơi yên tĩnh
vocab.example: Many people enjoy parks because they provide small benches tucked away from the main paths, offering a sense of privacy.
It's common to see nature lovers poring over the diverse flora and fauna found within the park's boundaries.

vocab.meaning: làm cho sảng khoái/tươi mới lại
vocab.example: A quick walk through a green space is an excellent way to freshen up your mind after spending hours in a stuffy office.

vocab.meaning: suy ngẫm/cân nhắc kỹ về một vấn đề
vocab.example: The rhythmic pace of walking in a park allows individuals to mull over life's challenges in a peaceful environment.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn/đẩy lùi (cảm giác tiêu cực, bệnh tật)
vocab.example: Regular strolls in nature can help fend off feelings of anxiety and sedentary-related health issues.

vocab.meaning: lên kế hoạch/vạch ra (ý tưởng, hành trình)
vocab.example: I find that walking in the park helps me map out my schedule for the week ahead without any distractions.
Being in an open, green space encourages people to release the stress they've been bottling up during work.
A park provides a safe and pleasant environment that helps locals keep to their daily exercise routines.

vocab.meaning: thả hồn theo/mơ màng (hoặc ngủ quên)
vocab.example: The tranquil atmosphere of the park makes it easy to drift off into a daydream and forget about one's worries.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó vượt qua một giai đoạn khó khăn
vocab.example: For those living in cramped apartments, a weekend visit to the park is often enough to tide them over until their next vacation.
